zh.Wybunbury, Chesire, England: 英國英格蘭爾維布波瑞
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Sharples Jr.於1555年出生在英國爾維布波瑞時，他的父親John Sharples20歲，母親Elizabeth Bolton20歲。他於大約1576年與Cicely Caldwell結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1661年住在英國英格蘭爾維布波瑞。他去世於1641年4月27日在英國爾維布波瑞享年86歲，埋葬在英國爾維布波瑞。

zh-hans.Wybunbury, Chesire, England: 英国英格兰爾維布波瑞
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Sharples Jr.于1555年出生在英国爾維布波瑞时，他的父亲John Sharples20岁，母亲Elizabeth Bolton20岁。他于大约1576年与Cicely Caldwell结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1661年住在英国英格兰爾維布波瑞。他去世于1641年4月27日在英国爾維布波瑞享年86岁，埋葬在英国爾維布波瑞。

nameMeanings.name: Sharples
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Sharples (Lancashire). The etymology of the placename is uncertain; it may derive from Old English scearp ‘sharp, pointed, steep’ + lǣs ‘meadow’ or lēas, plural of lēah ‘wood, woodland, clearing’, or from scearpol ‘place characterized by a pointed feature, pointed hill’.

variants.name: Sharpley
meanings: habitational name from Sharplow in Tissington (Derbyshire), from Old English scearp ‘sharp, pointed’ + hlāw ‘hill, mound’.
variant of Sharples with loss of -s.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Sharples Jr. was born in 1555, in Wybunbury, Cheshire, England, his father, John Sharples, was 20 and his mother, Elizabeth Bolton, was 20. He married Cicely Caldwell about 1576. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He lived in Wybunbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom in 1661. He died on 27 April 1641, in Wybunbury, Cheshire, England, at the age of 86, and was buried in Wybunbury, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Sharples Jr. est né en 1555, à Wybunbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, John Sharples, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Bolton, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Cicely Caldwell environ 1576. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Il a vécu à Wybunbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1661. Il est décédé le 27 avril 1641, à Wybunbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 86 ans, et a été enterré à Wybunbury, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Sharples Jr. 1555 in Wybunbury, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Sharples 20 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Bolton 20. Er hat um 1576 Cicely Caldwell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1661 hat er in Wybunbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom gelebt. Er starb am 27. April 1641 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Wybunbury, Cheshire, England und wurde in Wybunbury, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Sharples Jr. è nato il nel 1555 nel Wybunbury, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, John Sharples, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Bolton, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Cicely Caldwell circa 1576. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Vissuto a Wybunbury, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1661. Morì il 27 aprile 1641, nel Wybunbury, Cheshire, England, all'età di 86 anni, e fu sepolto a Wybunbury, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Sharples Jr.が1555年にイギリスチェシュアイアウイブンブリーで生まれた時，父John Sharplesは20歳，母Elizabeth Boltonは20歳であった。約1576年にCicely Caldwellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1661年にはイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアウイブンブリーに住んでいた。彼は1641年4月27日にイギリスチェシュアイアウイブンブリーで86歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアウイブンブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Sharples Jr.(이)가 1555년 영국 체실르 윈이버버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Sharples(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Bolton(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1576년 Cicely Caldwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1661년도에 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 윈이버버이에서 살았다. 그는 1641년 4월 27일 영국 체실르 윈이버버이에서 86세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 윈이버버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Sharples Jr. nasceu em 1555, em Wybunbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Sharples, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Bolton, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Cicely Caldwell aproximadamente 1576. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele viveu em Wybunbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1661. Ele faleceu em 27 de abril de 1641, em Wybunbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 86 anos, e foi sepultado em Wybunbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Sharples Jr. родился в 1555 г. в местности вибунбури, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Sharples было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Bolton, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Cicely Caldwell около 1576 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он жил в местности вибунбури, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в 1661 году. Он умер 27 апреля 1641 г. в местности вибунбури, чешир, Англия в возрасте 86 лет и был похоронен в местности вибунбури, чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Sharples Jr. nació en 1555, en Wybunbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Sharples, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Bolton, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Cicely Caldwell aproximadamente 1576. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Vivió en Wybunbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1661. Murió el 27 de abril de 1641, en Wybunbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 86 años, y fue sepultado en Wybunbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
